scripts.deploy: bunx supabase link --project-ref iambzzclljayqdxkeepy && bunx supabase db push --include-all
scripts.gen:types: bunx supabase gen types typescript --linked --schema public > src/types/supabase.ts && cp src/types/supabase.ts ../audiobookphile-web/src/types/supabase.ts
scripts.sync: bun run gen:types && bun run sync:schemas
